home.title: eCampus | eCampus Platform - University Learning Platform for Jordanian Students
home.description: eCampus (ecampusjo) - The comprehensive educational platform for Jordanian university students. Study materials, summaries, past exams, quizzes, and courses for all Jordanian universities.

hero.subtitle: The ultimate platform for university students. Access comprehensive study materials, smart quiz banks, and AI-powered academic guidance — all in one place.

features.sectionDescription: eCampus combines all the tools you need for academic success into one seamless platform designed specifically for university students.

studyMaterials.title: Study Materials
studyMaterials.description: Access curated study materials, lecture notes, and resources organized by course and topic.

quizBank.title: Quiz Bank
quizBank.description: Practice with comprehensive question banks covering all subjects. Track your progress and improve with every attempt.

aiSupervisor.title: AI Supervisor
aiSupervisor.description: Get instant, personalized academic guidance around the clock. Ask questions, get explanations, and receive study recommendations.

community.title: Community
community.description: Connect with fellow students, share knowledge, and collaborate on study groups.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Visualize your learning journey with detailed analytics and performance insights.

universityNetwork.title: University Network
universityNetwork.description: Access resources from universities worldwide. Find course-specific materials tailored to your curriculum.

howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.description: Get started with eCampus in four simple steps and begin your journey to academic excellence.

createAccount.title: Create Account
createAccount.description: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required to get started with eCampus.

findCourses.title: Find Your Courses
findCourses.description: Search and select your university and courses. We'll personalize your learning experience.

accessMaterials.title: Access Materials
accessMaterials.description: Explore comprehensive study materials, notes, and resources curated for your courses.

succeed.title: Excel & Succeed
succeed.description: Practice with quizzes, get AI guidance, and track your progress to academic success.

testimonials.title: Loved by Students
testimonials.description: Join thousands of students who have transformed their academic journey with eCampus.

sarah.name: Lina Khalil
sarah.content: eCampus completely transformed how I study. The organized materials helped me understand complex anatomy concepts I was struggling with for months. My grades improved significantly!

michael.name: Omar Khalaf
michael.content: The quiz bank is incredible! I practiced with hundreds of questions and felt fully prepared for my exams. The instant feedback feature is a game-changer for engineering students.

emma.name: Nour Saleh
emma.content: Having all my study materials organized in one place saved me countless hours. The platform is intuitive and the content quality is exceptional for Jordanian curricula.

david.name: Ahmad Hamdan
david.content: eCampus helped me connect with other CS students. We share resources and help each other out. It's like having a study group available 24/7 right here in Jordan.

lisa.name: Rasha Mansour
lisa.content: I was skeptical at first, but the course materials genuinely match our university syllabus and provide detailed, accurate explanations. Absolutely worth it!

james.name: Kareem Nawas
james.content: eCampus helped me prepare for my exams efficiently. The structured learning paths and progress tracking kept me motivated throughout my academic journey.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
cta.description: Join thousands of students who are already achieving their academic goals with eCampus. Get started in seconds — no credit card required.

benefits.quizzes: Smart quiz bank with instant feedback

prepaidCard.title: Get Your Course Access Card
prepaidCard.description: Purchase a prepaid code via WhatsApp and unlock full course access instantly.

hero.title: Welcome to eCampus
hero.description: Your all-in-one university learning management platform. Centralize your studies, collaborate with peers, and excel academically.

allInOne.title: All in One Place
allInOne.description: No more switching between multiple platforms. Everything you need for your studies is centralized here.

saveTime.title: Save Time
saveTime.description: Quick access to organized materials means less time searching and more time learning.

studySmarter.title: Study Smarter
studySmarter.description: Interactive quizzes and organized resources help you prepare effectively for exams.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We're on a mission to eliminate the chaos of scattered educational resources. eCampus provides students with a single, reliable destination for all their academic needs while empowering educators with powerful content management tools.

centralizedLearning.title: Centralized Learning
centralizedLearning.description: Access all your courses, materials, and resources in one unified platform

collaborative.title: Collaborative Community
collaborative.description: Connect with students, educators, and content creators across universities

assessments.title: Interactive Assessments
assessments.description: Test your knowledge with quizzes and track your progress in real-time

accessible.title: Accessible Anywhere
accessible.description: Study on any device with our mobile-responsive platform design

efficient.title: Efficient Content Management
efficient.description: Organized folders and categories make finding resources effortless

secure.title: Secure & Reliable
secure.description: Your data and academic progress are protected with industry-standard security

whatYouCanDo.title: What You Can Do on eCampus

items.browse: Browse and access course materials organized by subject
items.download: Download PDFs, notes, and study guides for offline use
items.quizzes: Take quizzes to test your knowledge and track your scores
items.search: Search and filter resources to find exactly what you need

items.upload: Upload your own study materials to help fellow students
items.create: Create and publish quizzes for practice and revision
items.organize: Organize content in folders for easy navigation
items.build: Build a library of resources for your courses

selfPaced.title: Self-Paced Learning
selfPaced.description: Study at your own pace, anytime and anywhere. Access materials 24/7 and learn on your schedule.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.description: Monitor your performance with detailed analytics and insights on quiz scores and course completion.

library.title: Rich Content Library
library.description: Access thousands of study materials, lecture notes, PDFs, and resources organized by course and topic.

community.title: Active Community
community.description: Connect with fellow students and educators. Share knowledge and collaborate on learning.

contribute.description: Share your expertise and help thousands of students succeed. Reach out to us on WhatsApp to join our community of educators and content creators!
